Citing TROVE
============

If you use TROVE, please cite the following:

- `Franz et al. 2025. Optimizing Kilonova Searches: A Case Study of the Type IIb SN 2025ulz in the Localization Volume of the Low-significance Gravitational Wave Event S250818k. <https://ui.adsabs.harvard.edu/abs/2025ApJ...994L..45F/abstract>`_
- `Vieira et al. 2026. Search For a Counterpart to the Subsolar Mass Gravitational Wave Candidate S251112cm. <https://ui.adsabs.harvard.edu/abs/2026arXiv260317009V/abstract>`_
